codeReview.summary: Reviewed commit 85ae0ae against the feature contract: server eventBus now retains a per-org 100-event ring buffer with seq/ts metadata, GET /api/orgs/:orgId/events/poll is implemented with the same Bearer/access_token auth+membership checks as SSE, client sseStore switches to polling after 3 consecutive SSE failures and polls every 5s using since_seq/lastSeq, and ConnectionStatusIndicator renders a polling state. No blocking or non-blocking correctness issues were found in feature scope.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The implementation-worker skill mandates agent-browser verification for any UI behavior change, but this feature changed ConnectionStatusIndicator UI and the transcript skeleton shows no agent-browser invocation while handoff.skillFeedback still reports followedProcedure=true.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Skill requirement: /Users/andy/Documents/GitHub/org-planner/.factory/skills/implementation-worker/SKILL.md lines 18, 59-65. Transcript check for workerSessionId d83e4569-da50-4107-a45b-2f5a4b83225f: jq contains("agent-browser") => false in /Users/andy/.factory/missions/80c5e196-cca5-4acd-9581-c44e4271690a/worker-transcripts.jsonl; handoff marks followedProcedure=true.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Shared SSE reference is now stale after this feature: it documents only the stream endpoint and omits polling fallback endpoint/status semantics.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: /Users/andy/Documents/GitHub/org-planner/.factory/library/sse.md line 9 documents only GET /api/orgs/:orgId/events; line 54 lists connection states as idle|connecting|connected|reconnecting|disconnected (missing polling) and has no /events/poll guidance.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Mission AGENTS.md says all protected routes use auth middleware, but SSE (including new /events/poll) intentionally performs controller-level token extraction for EventSource compatibility. The convention is too broad and can mislead workers reviewing SSE-auth paths.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: /Users/andy/.factory/missions/80c5e196-cca5-4acd-9581-c44e4271690a/AGENTS.md line 37: 'All protected routes use the auth middleware'. /Users/andy/Documents/GitHub/org-planner/packages/server/src/routes/sseRoutes.ts comments and route design explicitly bypass global auth middleware for SSE-compatible token handling.

summary: PASS: implementation satisfies the polling-fallback feature requirements end-to-end with no actionable code defects found; noted shared-state gaps around skill procedure compliance signaling and SSE documentation/convention clarity.
